violations.text: The condensate from the (refrigerator/freezer unit) refrigeration unit is draining onto the floor. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024
Three bay sink was lacking- food surface sanitizer. Sanitizer is required establishment is to purchase food surface sanitizer and test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2024

There is insufficient refrigeration equipment/capacity to maintain a temperature of 41 degrees or below.There is insufficient hot holding equipment to maintain foods at 135 degrees F or above. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2024
